questions.question: What is the fundamental difference between a base language model and an instruction-tuned model?
questions.questionZh: 基础语言模型（Base Language Model）与指令微调模型（Instruction-Tuned Model）之间的根本区别是什么？
options: A base model continues text patterns; an instruction-tuned model follows instructions and answers questions
optionsZh: 基础模型（Base Model）用于延续文本模式；指令微调模型（Instruction-Tuned Model）则用于遵循指令并回答问题。
指令微调模型 (Instruction-tuned models) 的规模更大。
基础模型 (Base models) 速度更快。
questions.explanation: A base model trained with next-token prediction continues text patterns. Ask it a question and it may generate more questions. SFT teaches it to produce answers by training on (instruction, response) pairs.
questions.explanationZh: 采用下一个词元预测（Next-Token Prediction）训练的基础模型（Base Model）主要用于续写文本模式。向它提问时，它可能会生成更多问题。监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning, SFT）则通过在（指令，回复）对上进行训练，使模型学会生成答案。

questions.question: What is the purpose of masking loss on non-assistant tokens during SFT?
questions.questionZh: 在监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning, SFT）过程中，对非助手词元（Non-assistant Tokens）进行损失掩码（Masking Loss）的目的是什么？
options: To train the model only to generate responses, not to memorize the instruction format or system prompts
optionsZh: 为了加快训练 (training) 速度
仅训练模型生成回复，而非使其记忆指令格式或系统提示词。
questions.explanation: During SFT, you want the model to learn how to respond, not how to reproduce the instruction. Loss masking sets the loss to 0 for system/user tokens so gradients only come from the assistant's response tokens.
questions.explanationZh: 在监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning, SFT）过程中，你希望模型学习的是如何生成回复，而非如何复述指令。损失掩码（Loss Masking）会将系统与用户词元（Token）的损失（Loss）设为 0，从而使梯度（Gradient）仅来源于助手回复部分的词元。

questions.question: What format does SFT training data typically follow?
questions.questionZh: 监督微调（SFT）训练数据通常采用什么格式？
options: Chat template with system, user, and assistant roles marked by special tokens
optionsZh: 原始文本文档（Raw text documents）
使用特殊标记 (special tokens) 标识系统 (system)、用户 (user) 和助手 (assistant) 角色的聊天模板 (chat template)
questions.explanation: SFT data uses a structured chat format: a system prompt setting behavior, a user instruction, and an assistant response. Special tokens mark role boundaries so the model learns the conversational structure.
questions.explanationZh: 监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning, SFT）数据采用结构化的对话格式：包含用于设定行为的系统提示词（System Prompt）、用户指令（User Instruction）以及助手回复（Assistant Response）。特殊标记（Special Tokens）用于划分角色边界，以便模型学习对话结构。

questions.question: Why might an SFT model produce lower perplexity on benchmarks but worse conversational quality?
questions.questionZh: 为什么监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning, SFT）模型在基准测试（Benchmarks）上可能表现出更低的困惑度（Perplexity），但对话质量却更差？
options: SFT optimizes for pattern matching on training examples, not for the nuanced quality judgments humans care about -- that requires RLHF/DPO
optionsZh: 监督微调（SFT）优化的是训练样本上的模式匹配，而非人类所关注的细微质量判断——后者需要依赖基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）或直接偏好优化（DPO）。
学习率 (Learning Rate) 设置错误。
questions.explanation: SFT teaches the model to follow formats and produce plausible responses. It doesn't teach which response is better when multiple valid options exist. Human preference alignment (RLHF/DPO) addresses this gap.
questions.explanationZh: 监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning, SFT）旨在教会模型遵循特定格式并生成合理的回复。然而，当存在多个有效选项时，它无法指导模型判断哪个回复更优。人类偏好对齐（Human Preference Alignment，RLHF/DPO）正是为了弥补这一空白。

questions.question: How many high-quality instruction-response pairs are typically needed for effective SFT?
questions.questionZh: 要实现有效的监督微调（Supervised Fine-Tuning, SFT），通常需要多少高质量的指令-回复对（instruction-response pairs）？
questions.explanation: SFT is surprisingly data-efficient. Studies show that 10K-100K high-quality examples (like the Alpaca or LIMA datasets) can effectively teach instruction following. Quality matters far more than quantity.
questions.explanationZh: 监督微调 (SFT) 的数据效率出奇地高。研究表明，仅需 1 万至 10 万条高质量样本（如 Alpaca 或 LIMA 数据集），即可有效训练模型掌握指令遵循 (Instruction Following) 能力。质量远比数量重要。
